label: Curve keyframe
description: A single keyframe in a ComplexCurve. Maps to UnityEngine.Keyframe serialized via fi.Name (m_* prefix).

m_InTangent.label: In tangent
m_InTangent.description: Incoming tangent slope at this keyframe.

m_OutTangent.label: Out tangent
m_OutTangent.description: Outgoing tangent slope at this keyframe.

m_InWeight.label: In weight
m_InWeight.description: Incoming tangent weight (used only when m_WeightedMode enables it).

m_OutWeight.label: Out weight
m_OutWeight.description: Outgoing tangent weight (used only when m_WeightedMode enables it).

m_WeightedMode.label: Weighted mode
m_WeightedMode.description: Unity WeightedMode integer flag controlling which tangents use their weight values.
